message:
test(fcp-conformance/error-codes): pin FcpError numeric codes + retry contracts (br-mhuy3)

FcpError numeric codes are wire-format contracts that admin tooling,
CLI, and connector callers all key on. is_retryable + retry_after
drive automatic retry loops — wrong classifications cause either
retry storms (false positive) or premature give-ups (false negative).
Zero conformance pinning despite all three being part of the public
contract.

Adds 22 tests against the public fcp_core::FcpError API:

- 12× literal numeric code pinning across all 7 categories:
  TokenExpired=2002, TokenNotYetValid=2005, InvalidSignature=2003,
  CapabilityDenied=3001, RateLimited=3002, OperationNotGranted=3003,
  ResourceNotAllowed=3004, ZoneViolation=4001, TaintViolation=4002,
  ElevationRequired=4003, BudgetExceeded=6004, MissingField=1006,
  Internal=9001
- error_code_string_format_is_fcp_dash_zero_padded_4_digits
  (zero-padding pinned at both 2-digit and 4-digit numeric inputs)
- parameterized_code_field_drives_format_for_invalid_request
  (InvalidRequest carries variable code; field MUST drive output)
- external_error_status_code_drives_numeric_mapping (429->7001,
  504->7002, others->7003 — the documented backpressure/timeout/
  generic split)
- is_retryable_classifies_retryable_subset_correctly (6 retryable
  variants pinned)
- is_retryable_classifies_non_retryable_correctly (8 permanent
  variants — automatic retry would loop on these)
- external_error_is_retryable_uses_explicit_field (caller-supplied
  bool — both true and false branches pinned)
- retry_after_for_rate_limited_returns_configured_duration (extracts
  retry_after_ms as Duration)
- retry_after_for_external_passes_through_explicit_field (Some +
  None branches)
- retry_after_returns_none_for_non_retry_errors (5 variants)

All 22 pass locally in <0.01s via cargo test -p fcp-conformance --test
fcp_error_codes_conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
